# ResidentPravo

> ResidentPravo is a legal and business consulting firm based in Limassol, Cyprus. We specialise in company registration, residence and permanent residency permits, corporate bank account opening, accounting, and full-cycle business relocation to Cyprus. Founded by Artur Mardanyan, the company works directly with licensed lawyers from the Cyprus Bar Association and certified auditors — no intermediaries. We serve entrepreneurs, investors and families from Russia, Ukraine, Armenia, UAE, Greece and 15+ other countries. All services are available fully remotely. Languages: Russian (primary), English.

---

## Services

- **Company Registration in Cyprus** — Incorporation of Cyprus Ltd, LLP, Foreign Interest Company (FIC). Full document preparation, registered office, company secretary, corporate bank account. Typical timeline: 7–10 business days.
- **Residence Permit (ВНЖ)** — Temporary residence permit via company (FIC route), Pink Slip (Category F digital nomad), and other routes. Valid for 2 years, renewable.
- **Permanent Residency (ПМЖ)** — Permanent Residency through investment (Category F). Permanent status, no renewal required.
- **Bank Account Opening** — Personal and corporate accounts in Cyprus banks. Full document support and bank liaison.
- **Accounting & Compliance** — Bookkeeping, VAT filing, annual audit, tax registration (TIC/VAT), payroll. Handled by licensed Cypriot accountants.
- **Business Relocation** — End-to-end relocation for companies and families: company setup, residence permits, insurance, tax residency.

---

## Key Facts

- Corporate tax in Cyprus: **15%** (raised from 12.5% as of 1 January 2026) — still one of the most competitive rates in the EU
- IP Box regime available for IP-holding companies (effective rate can be lower)
- FIC (Foreign Interest Company) grants residence permits for founder + foreign employees
- Category F ПМЖ: permanent status, no minimum stay requirement
- Pink Slip (Ε.Υ.Α.Κ.): temporary residence for self-employed / digital nomads
- 10+ years of practice
- Clients from 15+ countries
- All processes manageable remotely without visiting Cyprus

---

- [Homepage (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/) — English homepage: residence permits, company registration, accounting in Cyprus.

### Services

- [ВНЖ и ПМЖ на Кипре (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/residence-permit-cyprus) — Полный гид по всем способам получения ВНЖ и ПМЖ на Кипре: документы, сроки, стоимость.
- [Residence Permit Cyprus (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/residence-permit-cyprus) — Complete guide to Cyprus residence and permanent residency: routes, documents, timelines.
- [Регистрация компании на Кипре (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/company-registration-cyprus) — Регистрация кипрской компании под ключ: Ltd, FIC, счёт, бухгалтерия.
- [Company Registration Cyprus (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/company-registration-cyprus) — End-to-end Cyprus company formation: Ltd, FIC, bank account, compliance.
- [Бухгалтерия и аудит на Кипре (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/accounting-audit-cyprus) — Бухгалтерское сопровождение, VAT, payroll, ежегодный аудит и налоговое сопровождение кипрских компаний.
- [Accounting & Audit Cyprus (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/accounting-audit-cyprus) — Bookkeeping, VAT, payroll, annual audit and tax compliance for Cyprus companies.

### Blog

- [Блог (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/blog) — Практические статьи о визах, ВНЖ, регистрации компаний и налогах на Кипре.
- [Blog (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/blog) — Practical guides on Cyprus visas, residency, company registration and taxes.
- [Визы на Кипр 2026 (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/blog/cyprus-visas-2026) — Полный гид по типам виз на Кипр: туристические, долгосрочные, ВНЖ, транзитные.
- [Cyprus Visas 2026 (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/blog/cyprus-visas-2026) — Complete guide to Cyprus visa types in 2026: tourist, long-stay, residence, transit.
- [Налоги на Кипре 2026 (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/blog/nalogi-na-kipre-2026-stavki) — Ставки подоходного налога на 2026 год, необлагаемый минимум €22 000, налог на дивиденды.
- [Cyprus Taxes 2026 (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/blog/nalogi-na-kipre-2026-stavki) — 2026 personal income tax rates, the €22,000 tax-free threshold, and dividend tax.
- [Банковский счёт для компании на Кипре 2026 (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/blog/bankovskiy-schet-kipr-2026) — Регламент ЕС 2022/328, какие банки и EMI рассматривают заявки граждан РФ, документы, сроки и стоимость.
- [Cyprus Company Bank Account 2026 (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/blog/bankovskiy-schet-kipr-2026) — EU Regulation 2022/328, which banks and EMIs accept applications from Russian nationals, documents, timelines and cost.
- [Продление ВНЖ на Кипре онлайн 2026 (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/blog/prodlenie-vnj-kipr-onlayn-2026) — Новый цифровой сервис gov.cy для продления ВНЖ: категории, документы, шаги подачи и ограничения сервиса.
- [Cyprus Residence Permit Renewal Online 2026 (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/blog/prodlenie-vnj-kipr-onlayn-2026) — The new gov.cy digital service for residence permit renewal: eligible categories, documents, application steps and current limits.

- [Артур Марданян (RU)](https://www.residentpravo.com/ru/experts/artur-mardanyan) — Основатель ResidentPravo. Личный опыт переезда на Кипр, 10+ лет практики, работа с лицензированными адвокатами Cyprus Bar Association.
- [Artur Mardanyan (EN)](https://www.residentpravo.com/en/experts/artur-mardanyan) — Founder of ResidentPravo. Personal relocation experience, 10+ years in Cyprus business and immigration law, partnered with Cyprus Bar Association lawyers.
